title: Elytra Bar HUD
description: An overlay that indicates how much durability your elytra has
body:
Have you ever died from an unfortunate fall? Maybe that hardcore world of yours became history because you couldn't know that your elytra was about to break?
With this mod, every time you wear an elytra, a simple HUD overlay will apear on your screen, telling you how much durability your elytra has, without the need to see the inventory.

You can use the HUD type you prefer, between icons, bar, or a mix of both, as well as deciding the icon's style, using the config file.
If you want to see all the overlay types you can choose, check the images.
It also has subtle animations for when your elytra gets damaged or repaired.

Its client-side, which means you can use it on vanilla servers.

This mod also works with the Elytra Slot mod, for anyone who might use it (optional).
